companyDescription1: Welcome to our app—a platform designed to bridge the gap between employers, workers, and mediators, creating a seamless experience for rural communities to connect and collaborate effectively. Our app is not just a digital solution; it’s a mission-driven initiative to empower the rural workforce and provide opportunities to enhance livelihoods while addressing the essential needs of employers.
companyDescription2: In today’s fast-paced world, finding skilled workers for specific jobs, especially in rural areas, can be challenging. At the same time, many talented individuals in villages struggle to find consistent work despite their expertise. This gap inspired us to create a platform that acts as the vital link between employers looking for services, workers ready to take on tasks, and mediators who play a pivotal in ensuring smooth collaboration.
howAppWorkEmployer: Whether you need help with home construction, farming, electrical repairs, plumbing, or any other skilled labor, you can easily post a service request. You can define your needs, set timelines, and communicate directly with available workers or mediators.
howAppWorkWorker: Skilled laborers can browse available jobs, apply for services that match their expertise, and work confidently, knowing they have a reliable platform to support them.
howAppWorkMediator: Acting as a bridge, mediators ensure that services are completed successfully, guiding workers and assisting employers throughout the process. They play a vital in communication and quality assurance.
ourMissonDescription1: Our mission is simple yet impactful: to create opportunities, build trust, and improve the quality of life for rural communities. We believe in the potential of every individual and aim to be the catalyst that brings employers and workers together in a mutually beneficial way.
ourMissonDescription2: By leveraging technology, we are creating more than just an app; we are building a community where people can rely on each other, achieve their goals, and uplift their livelihoods. Join us on this journey to transform rural employment and make meaningful connections that matter.
ourVisionDescription: Our vision is to create a world where rural talent is not overlooked but celebrated and utilized to its fullest potential. By connecting employers and workers through a reliable and transparent platform, we aim to transform rural employment dynamics and contribute to the growth and self-reliance of communities.

privacyPolicyIntro: Apna Rojgar (“we”, “our”, “us”) operates a digital platform that connects workers, employers, and mediators for lawful daily-wage and skilled work across India. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it when you use our mobile app and related services.
privacySection1Body: When you register and use Apna Rojgar, we may collect: your name, mobile number, email address (if provided), profile photo, skills, work preferences, address or work location, date of birth or age range (where applicable), language preference, and information you share while posting work, applying for work, or communicating through the platform. We may also collect device information, app usage data, and approximate location when you choose to share it for finding nearby work.
privacySection2Body: We use your information to create and manage your account, show relevant work opportunities, help employers find suitable workers, enable mediators to assist bookings, send service-related notifications, improve app performance, prevent misuse, and comply with applicable law. We do not sell your personal data to third parties for unrelated marketing.
privacySection3Body: If you post work or apply for work, we store details such as job type, duration, pay information, facilities offered, photos you upload, and location related to the work site. Location is used to show distance and help users make informed decisions. You can choose to enter an address manually or use your current location when permitted.
privacySection4Body: We share limited information only when needed to operate the platform—for example, showing your name, skills, and contact details to an employer or worker involved in a booking you choose to pursue. We may use trusted service providers for hosting, analytics, SMS/OTP, notifications, and payment processing (such as Cashfree). These partners are required to handle data securely and only for the services they provide to us.
privacySection5Body: We take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information against unauthorised access, loss, or misuse. No online system is completely secure, so please use a strong password, keep your OTP private, and contact us immediately if you suspect unauthorised access to your account.
privacySection6Body: You may update your profile information in the app, manage notification preferences where available, and request account deactivation or deletion through the profile settings or by contacting us. You may refuse optional permissions such as location or photos, though some features may work in a limited way without them.
privacySection7Body: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services, resolve disputes, enforce our terms, and meet legal requirements. When you delete your account, we remove or anonymise personal data within a reasonable period, except where retention is required by law.
privacySection8Body: Apna Rojgar is intended for users who are legally eligible to work in India and are at least 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a minor has created an account, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.
privacySection9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Important changes will be communicated through the app or our website. For questions or requests regarding your privacy, contact Apna Rojgar at info@apnarojgarindia.com or +91 6397308499. Address: Jalesar, Etah, Uttar Pradesh – 207302, India.
termsAndConditionsIntro: Welcome to Apna Rojgar. By creating an account or using our app, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully. Apna Rojgar helps workers, employers, and mediators connect for lawful work opportunities. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use the platform.
termsSection1Body: Apna Rojgar is a technology platform operated to facilitate discovery, communication, and coordination between workers seeking employment and employers or mediators seeking labour for legitimate work such as construction, farming, shop work, home maintenance, driving, and other skilled or daily-wage tasks. We are an intermediary platform and are not the direct employer of workers listed on the app unless explicitly stated otherwise in writing.
termsSection2Body: You must be at least 18 years old, legally permitted to work or hire workers in India, and provide accurate registration details. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account.
termsSection3Body: The platform supports workers, employers, and mediators. Each role has different features. You must select and use the role that reflects your actual purpose. Misrepresenting your identity or role is not permitted.
termsSection4Body: Employers and mediators must post truthful job details including location, duration, pay, facilities, and work details. Workers must provide honest skills and availability when applying. Both parties should communicate respectfully and honour agreed terms to the best of their ability. Apna Rojgar does not guarantee that every post will receive applications or that every application will result in work.
termsSection5Body: All users must behave respectfully and lawfully. You must not harass, threaten, abuse, discriminate against, or endanger any person; post false, misleading, or illegal work; request or perform unlawful activities; share harmful, hateful, or violent content; or use the platform for fraud, spam, or unauthorised commercial solicitation. We may remove content or suspend accounts that violate these standards.
termsSection6Body: Some features, such as optional service promotion, may require payment through approved payment partners. All payment terms, amounts, and refund rules shown at the time of purchase apply. Wages and payments between workers and employers are agreed directly between the parties unless the platform explicitly offers a managed payment feature.
termsSection7Body: Apna Rojgar facilitates connections but does not supervise worksites, guarantee worker quality, guarantee job completion, or assume responsibility for workplace safety, wages, disputes, injuries, or property damage arising from work arranged through the platform. Users should verify details, follow applicable labour laws, and take reasonable safety precautions at work sites.
termsSection8Body: You retain ownership of content you upload, such as photos and descriptions, but grant Apna Rojgar a limited licence to display and use that content solely to operate and promote the service. You must not upload content that infringes others’ rights or violates law.
termsSection9Body: We may warn, restrict, suspend, or terminate accounts that violate these terms, applicable law, or community guidelines, or that create risk for other users or the platform. You may deactivate or delete your account through the app or by contacting support.
termsSection10Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of competent courts in Uttar Pradesh, India, unless otherwise required by applicable law. For support or legal queries, contact Apna Rojgar at info@apnarojgarindia.com, +91 6397308499, or visit www.apnarojgarindia.com.
